label: Scawfulbot
build_action: osascript -e 'tell app "Terminal" to do script "cd /Users/scawful/src/lab/scawfulbot/apps/apple && xcodegen generate >/dev/null && xcodebuild -project Scawfulbot.xcodeproj -scheme ScawfulbotMac -configuration Debug -destination platform=macOS -derivedDataPath /Users/scawful/src/lab/scawfulbot/apps/apple/build-macos CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY= build && open /Users/scawful/src/lab/scawfulbot/apps/apple/build-macos/Build/Products/Debug/Scawfulbot.app"'
missing_message: scawfulbot.app is missing. Rebuild the macOS app (unsigned local build)?

label: Loom
build_action: osascript -e 'tell app "Terminal" to do script "cd /Users/scawful/src/lab/loom-studio && cmake -S . -B build && cmake --build build --target loom-studio -j$(sysctl -n hw.ncpu)"'
missing_message: loom-studio is missing. Rebuild the target?

label: premia v2
build_action: osascript -e 'tell app "Terminal" to do script "cd /Users/scawful/src/lab/premia && cmake -S . -B build-arch-next && cmake --build build-arch-next --target premia -j$(sysctl -n hw.ncpu)"'
missing_message: premia desktop is missing. Rebuild the desktop target?
